key_risks: Sharp tech/semiconductor pullback or factor rotation reversing recent momentum
Friday May jobs report (June 5) surprise shifting rate expectations and hitting growth stocks
Elevated forward P/E (25.9) leaves rich valuations vulnerable to any negative catalyst

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, robust semiconductor sales up 25% QoQ, AI capex tailwind, leading trailing returns.
Tech sector leading with broad AI infrastructure spending growth and strong recent momentum.
Semiconductor supply-chain leverage with very strong recent momentum into the window.
Momentum factor outperforming broadly; favorable risk appetite with low VIX and tight credit spreads.
Benchmark-relative core holding to maintain market exposure with positive trend.

portfolio_rationale: Risk-on tilt toward AI/semiconductor leadership where momentum, earnings, and capex tailwinds are strongest, with low VIX and tight spreads supporting continuation over a one-week window.
rationale_summary: Concentrate in semiconductor/tech momentum leaders supported by AI capex and strong trailing returns, anchored by SP500 to manage benchmark-relative risk.
